prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约2231名、1914名、2334名、1549名、2130名，整体波动较大，近5年呈现\"升-降-升-降\"的震荡格局 。2025年基准位次约2130名，较2024年1549名后移约581名，反映出当年报考热度有所回落；该校在海南省招生计划2021–2022年均为46人，2023–2024年增至48 人，2025年进一步扩至50人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。，但近年扩招趋势若延续，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定在第21–22名，属于全国顶尖高校行列，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要受2019年学伴事件遗留影响；2025年声誉评价为明显负面（涉及录取断档及学术不端舆情）。抖音热度排名总榜第20位，评价为\"高热\"（15条视 频、综合热度约249万），表明该校在短视频平台关注度仍较高。历史投档异常方面，2022年陕西断档、2024年四川理科调档线下降63分等信号，对报考心理有一定抑制作用；山东大学拥有数学A+、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A等5个A级学科，以及临床医学A-、基础医学A-、法学A-、物理学A-、 生物学A-、材料科学与工程A-、药学A-、软件工程A-等14个A-学科，共19个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推荐，临床医学为推荐，与山东大学优势学科高度匹配。海南省考生总数2021–2025年持续增长（52977→55945→61728→65969→67408） ，2026年预计约78000人，较2025年增长约15.7%，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次震荡走势、2026年海南省考生大幅增加（ 约+15.7%）带来的竞争加剧、山东大学声誉偏负面但抖音热度仍高的矛盾信号，以及近年招生计划小幅扩招的趋势，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移。预测最低位次约 2100名，区间1800–2400名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（计算机拔尖2.0班）
- 临床医学（五年制）
- 数学类（含潘承洞基地班、数学拔尖2.0班）
- 电子信息类（通信电子与光电方向）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（含卓越工程师培养计划）
- 中国语言文学类（含闻一多基地班）
- 经济学类（含薛暮桥班、彭实戈班）
- 物理学类（含王淦昌基地班）
- 网络空间安全（国家一流网络安全学院）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（先进材料与智慧成型方向）
- 化学类（含邓从豪基地班）
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境健康菁英班）
- 生物科学类（含童第周基地班）
- 智能建造与智慧交通
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2100名，区间1800–2400名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于2100），三档专业作为保底。位次在1800名左右可重 点冲刺计算机科学与技术、临床医学、数学类等王牌专业；位次在2400名左右建议以三档专业保底，二档专业稳妥填报。山东大学数学A+、中国语言文学A等优势学科对应的专业 值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 2231, 1914, 2334, 1549, and 2130, showing significant fluctuations and an "up-down-up-down" oscillation pattern over the past five years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2130, which is approximately 581 places lower than the 2024 ranking of 1549, reflecting a decline in application popularity that year. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 46 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 48 students in 2023 and 2024, and further expanded to 50 students in 2025, showing a trend of gradual annual expansion. However, if the recent expansion trend continues, it may somewhat alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings remained stable at 21st–22nd from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top universities nationwide and maintaining continuous appeal to candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the 2019 study partner incident. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was clearly negative (involving admission score drops and academic misconduct public opinion). Its Douyin popularity ranking was 20th overall, with a rating of "high heat" (15 videos, comprehensive popularity of about 2.49 million), indicating that the university still attracts high attention on short video platforms. Regarding historical admission anomalies, signals such as the score drop in Shaanxi in 2022 and the 63-point decrease in the science admission line in Sichuan in 2024 have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Shandong University has 5 A-level disciplines: Mathematics (A+), Chinese Language and Literature (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A), Control Science and Engineering (A), and Marxist Theory (A), as well as 14 A- disciplines: Clinical Medicine (A-), Basic Medicine (A-), Law (A-), Physics (A-), Biology (A-), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), Pharmacy (A-), and Software Engineering (A-), totaling 19 disciplines at A- or above. Its strong disciplinary strength strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, while Clinical Medicine is recommended, closely matching Shandong University's advantageous disciplines. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has been continuously increasing from 2021 to 2025 (52977 → 55945 → 61728 → 65969 → 67408), and is expected to reach about 78,000 in 2026, an increase of approximately 15.7% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating historical rankings, the intensified competition due to the significant increase in Hainan Province candidates in 2026 (approximately +15.7%), the contradictory signals of Shandong University's somewhat negative reputation but still high Douyin popularity, and the recent trend of slight enrollment expansion, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2100, with a range of 1800–2400.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Top Talent 2.0 Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Mathematics (Including Pan Chengdong Base Class, Mathematics Top Talent 2.0 Class)
- Electronic Information (Communication Electronics and Optoelectronics Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (Including Outstanding Engineer Training Program)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Including Wen Yiduo Base Class)
- Economics (Including Xue Muqiao Class, Peng Shige Class)
- Physics (Including Wang Ganchang Base Class)
- Cyberspace Security (National First-Class Cybersecurity College)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Advanced Materials and Intelligent Forming Direction)
- Chemistry (Including Deng Conghao Base Class)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Including Environmental Health Elite Class)
- Biological Sciences (Including Tong Dizhou Base Class)
- Intelligent Construction and Smart Transportation
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2100, with a range of 1800–2400. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring a ranking significantly better than 2100), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is around 1800, you can focus on reaching for top majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, and Mathematics. If your ranking is around 2400, it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety and fill Tier 2 majors steadily. Shandong University's advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics (A+) and Chinese Language and Literature (A) correspond to majors worth special attention.
